pages.text: Although insomnia is barely worth mentioning to demigods, the figures lurking in the dark are truly irritating: endless shrieks, shadows diving through the sky.$(br2)You decide to use their remains to craft a scroll, binding the night itself into a pact.
pages.title: Pact of Dark Night

pages.text: The power of dark night drives phantoms away and lets you unleash more strength in darkness.$(br2)The thinner the light, the stronger the pact: it increases damage, softens wounds, and steals life back through your attacks.
